caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" in white lettering, a green baseball cap, and black over-ear headphones. He sits behind a black professional microphone on a boom arm. The background features a wall adorned with several framed photographs, a white mannequin wearing a white garment, and clothing racks. Small logos appear in the lower corners of the frame, including one that reads "NO LESS" and another that says "NO LESS TV". Across the sequence, the man is speaking and reacting, transitioning from a neutral expression to a wide smile and laugh. His head shifts slightly as he engages in conversation, while the camera and background remain static.
